metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5280
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4, 7: immunogold EM showed localization of P2X4 (gene P2RX4) to the side of the postsynaptic density of asymmetric synapses, at the plasma membrane, in sections from parallel fibers on Purkinje cells and CA1 stratum radiatum of the hippocampus.. Experimental description: rats were used for all assays.
M&M: "Western blot of brain homogenates. Brain homogenates were obtained from postnatal day 5 (P5) Sprague Dawley rats.
...
Light microscopic immunocytochemistry. Six P21 Sprague Dawley rats were anesthetized"

antibody:
"Antibodies to the C terminus of P2X2 and P2X4 were generated using a synthetic peptide corresponding to the following sequences: P2X2, DSTSTDPKGLAQL; P2X4, DYEQGLSGEMNQ."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
